text.value: Die System-URI konnte für den Code PU im ValueSet https://gematik.de/fhir/ti/ValueSet/ti-environment-vs|1.4.0 nicht ermittelt werden

Der angegebene Wert ('PU') ist nicht im ValueSet 'TI Environments ValueSet' (https://gematik.de/fhir/ti/ValueSet/ti-environment-vs|1.4.0), und ein Code aus diesem Valueset ist erforderlich) (error message = Der angegebene Code '#PU' befindet sich nicht im ValueSet 'https://gematik.de/fhir/ti/ValueSet/ti-environment-vs|1.4.0'; Die System-URI konnte für den Code PU im ValueSet https://gematik.de/fhir/ti/ValueSet/ti-environment-vs|1.4.0 nicht ermittelt werden)

The resource CapabilityStatement/ti-flow-fachdienst-server could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

Conformance resource /home/runner/work/fhir-igs-workflow/fhir-igs-workflow/igs/core/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-GEM-ERP-CS-AvailabilityStatus.json - the canonical URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-AvailabilityStatus) does not match the URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/CodeSystem/GEM_ERP_CS_AvailabilityStatus). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match

The resource CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-AvailabilityStatus should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
URL Mismatch https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-AvailabilityStatus vs https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/CodeSystem/GEM_ERP_CS_AvailabilityStatus

Conformance resource /home/runner/work/fhir-igs-workflow/fhir-igs-workflow/igs/core/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-GEM-ERP-CS-DocumentType.json - the canonical URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-DocumentType) does not match the URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/CodeSystem/GEM_ERP_CS_DocumentType). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match

The resource CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-DocumentType should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
URL Mismatch https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-DocumentType vs https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/CodeSystem/GEM_ERP_CS_DocumentType

Conformance resource /home/runner/work/fhir-igs-workflow/fhir-igs-workflow/igs/core/fsh-generated/resources/CodeSystem-GEM-ERP-CS-FlowType.json - the canonical URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-FlowType) does not match the URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/CodeSystem/GEM_ERP_CS_FlowType). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match

The resource CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-FlowType should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
URL Mismatch https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/CodeSystem/GEM-ERP-CS-FlowType vs https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/CodeSystem/GEM_ERP_CS_FlowType

The resource CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/operation-outcome'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '4.0.0', found versions: 2.0.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.xver-r5.r4#0.1.0), 4.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#7.2.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/operation-outcome' to 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/operation-outcome|4.0.0'
Das ShareableConceptMap-Profil empfiehlt, dass das Element name befüllt wird, aber es ist nicht vorhanden. Veröffentlichte Concept Maps SOLLTEN mit dem ShareableConceptMap-Profil übereinstimmen

The resource ConceptMap/TIFLOW-CM-TelemetryDataStatusCodes could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

Conformance resource /home/runner/work/fhir-igs-workflow/fhir-igs-workflow/igs/core/fsh-generated/resources/StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-Signature.json - the canonical URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Signature) does not match the URL (https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/StructureDefinition/GEM_ERP_PR_Signature). Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match
The slice definition for Signature.type has a maximum of 1 but the slices add up to a maximum of 2. Check that this is what is intended

The resource StructureDefinition/GEM-ERP-PR-Signature could usefully have an OID assigned (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

The resource ValueSet/GEM-ERP-VS-AvailabilityStatus should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)

Use the special-url parameter if you really mean for it not to match

URL Mismatch https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/ValueSet/GEM-ERP-VS-FlowType vs https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/ValueSet/GEM_ERP_VS_FlowType

The resource ValueSet/tiflow-audit-event-agent-type-vs should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
Pinned the version of http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/operation-outcome to 4.0.0 from choices of 2.0.0 (hl7.fhir.uv.xver-r5.r4#0.1.0), 4.0.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0)
This include has some concepts with displays and some without - check that this is what is intended

The resource ValueSet/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-vs should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
Reference to draft CodeSystem http://hl7.org/fhir/task-status|4.0.1

The resource ValueSet/tiflow-order-task-status-vs should have an OID assigned to cater for possible use with OID based terminology systems e.g. CDA usage (OIDs are easy to assign - see https://build.fhir.org/ig/FHIR/fhir-tools-ig/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html#ig-parameters-auto-oid-root)
